text:
Market today: Tech is still under pressure, driven by macro sentiment rather than company specifics. The headlines about potential election impacts and geopolitical risks are weighing on broader market sentiment, which directly hits your concentrated tech/chip book.

Your holdings: SOXL (-44.66%) and SPAL (-47.59%) are bleeding. QQQ (-2.11%), QQQI (-3.37%), and SMH (-11.41%) are also in the red and flagged for attention. CRWD (14.79%) is your lone winner holding steady.

Watch: Keep an eye on the leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) – their decay is brutal on margin. Also, watch the tech-heavy Q's.

Bottom line: Your leveraged bets are getting hammered; focus on managing risk in these positions.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming exposure if the downward trend continues; the decay is amplified by margin.
SPAL: Similar to SOXL, evaluate reducing position size if losses accelerate.
No new buys today - hold and watch
